title: Skyblock 0.8.1
short_description: Skyblock in minecraft pe alpha 0.8.1 !
full_description:
How to add skyblock map in minecraft pe

1. Extract the ZIP file and copy the Skyblock file.

2. Open your file manager and scroll until you find the "games" folder, then open it.

3. Open the "com.mojang" folder.

4. Find the "minecraftWorlds" folder and paste the Skyblock folder inside it.

5. Done — your map should now appear in the game.

title: Camp Puzzlemaca
short_description: Welcome everyone, East here, and welcome to my adventure/puzzle/parkour map! The map in total took me 4 months. It’s fun and difficult and I hope you enjoy!
full_description:
————————-Storyline————————-

“Have fun loser!” your sister screamed out the window of the car, while sticking her tongue out. That’s the only happy thing you remembered from the whole week. Since you have been at this camp called Camp Fun-o, nothing fun at all has happened. It’s dreadful staying at this camp, in your opinion, because there is nothing to do.
The next morning, while trying to swim in the foot deep pool, a camp counselor calls you out. You have never seen this guy before and he looks suspicious. He orders you to go into your cabin and to read the note left on your bed and above the door. You, confused, go to see what it is. Entering your cabin, while realizing no one is in there, you read the note on your bed;

Welcome to Camp Puzzlemaca, registration starts inside the waterfall, do not tell anyone!

“Inside the waterfall?” you think to yourself, “Why there? What’s going to happen? Am I moving camps? Oh please tell me I’m moving camps!”
You then read the message on the bed;

To find the key, you must go and peek; in somewhere you’re not allowed!
   
“That’s it! The Camp Office!” you exclaim. You proudly sneak into the camp office; rapidly steal the key left on the table and start heading to the waterfall. Once reached inside the waterfall, you place the key inside the key holder. What lies behind the keyhole? Or under? Or above? This is when your new camp actually starts…
 
————————-Rules–———————–
1. Play on peaceful mode
2. No breaking blocks unless told to
3. Sleep always when there are beds
4. Have fun!

————————-Thanks–———————–

Thank you Rubikcubezzz for beta testing my map! Also for Serperior for inspiring me!

————————-————————-——————-

That’s it for today guys! Follow me on twitter @ApolloMcpe for more! See ya!

(Map Creator: East)

title: Dungeon-Craft Bonus Levels
short_description: It's been an entire year since Dungeon-Craft was first released, and what better way to celebrate this milestone then with an expansion to the original map.
full_description:
(Map Creator: Furminator)

Dungeon-Craft +Bonus Levels is still the same experience, but with three brand new levels to play! You can play these new levels before starting the main game, or beat the game and then go back to play. (by using minecart) So take a trip down memory lane, or just go ahead and play the new levels. There's a secret surprise for completing all three.

Play in peaceful mode!!!

title: Dungeon-Craft
short_description: Dungeon-Craft isn't a map built in 3 minutes, it's an adventure.
full_description:
(Map Creator: Furminator)

It's full of content and quality. The gameplay consists of jumping puzzles, collecting, and mazes. Most of the jumping is auto-jump for beginners, but there are jumps that will be more on level with skilled players. The game is set in an underground dungeon. But rumors say there's more down there than just dungeons. Will you be able to escape, find out in this exciting map, Dungeon-Craft. Watch this trailer if you want to see what's in store for you in Dungeon-Craft.

title: Dark Realm 0.8.0
short_description: Dark Realm [Sequel to Dungeon-Craft]
full_description: The adventure continues... After escaping Dungeon-Craft, you are now free. But the surface world has been covered in eternal darkness. Your only hope for defeating the darkness, is to collect the nine shine blocks. But finding them will require a brave adventurer to explore the entire map and retrieve them. Will you be able to shine the light, or will you be consumed along with the rest of the world. Find out in this epic adventure, and enter... The Dark Realm!

title: Dimension-Door
short_description: Dimension-Door [Prequel to Dungeon-Craft]
full_description:
(Map Creator: Furminator)

Go back to the past, before Dungeon-Craft and discover the events that take place before the adventure began. You are a magician that has been given a life-sentence in Dungeon-Craft, but you have a secret escape up your sleeve, a dimension door. The dimension door can teleport you through walls, and other dimensions. Will you escape, or never see the light of day again... adventure is knocking at Dimension-Door.

title: Dungeon-Craft: TacoTony's Escape Part 1
short_description: Another adventure map in the Dungeon-Craft series continues.
full_description: It takes place after Dimension Door, but before Dungeon-Craft. Confusing isn’t it? Anyways, you play as TacoTony, an employee of Dungeon-Craft. Your job is to file paperwork, which is really boring. One day, you decide you’ve had enough and want to go on an exciting adventure. It won’t be easy, but you have something special that will be very useful. Gravity gravel. With it, you have the ability to reverse gravity, allowing you to walk on the walls! For real! You will be able to flip entire rooms in this map to escape! Don’t believe me, then download and see for yourself. So don’t fall, but take a trip through TacoTony’s Escape!
file: data/0.8.1/Dungeon-Craft: TacoTony's Escape Part 1/Dungeon-Craft: TacoTony's Escape Part 1.zip

title: Survival Island PE
short_description: Survival Island PE for 0.5.0
full_description:
Rules:
1. No leaving island (no where to go anyway so, lol)
2. No hacking in blocks of any kind (including lava, water and tnt)
3. Post screenshots of your achievements if possible
4. If you die at all, then you lose
5. Have fun

Challenges:
1.Build a 2 story house with 20+ windows in it.
2.Build 10 bookshelves.
3.Create an underground tree farm.
4.Create an above ground mob/animal trap.
5.Gather 10 unused diamonds.
6.Find the treasure of the Lost Curator.
7.build an above ground cactus farm
8.Discover the secret Testing Lab
9.Fix Nether Reactor + Activate
9.Kill 7 Zombie Pigmen
10.Create a cobblestone generator
11.Construct an airstrip using glowstone for light
12.Build an aircraft
13.Build an melon farm onboard the airship

Credits:
Ashien - Creation of Survival Island
Maces006 - Editing for Pocket Edition usage
Legspin99 - Challenge idea

title: Epic Sprint Map
short_description: Welcome To Epic Sprint Map! The Sprint Parkour World
full_description: Epic Sprint Map is a unique parkour map that uses the Sprint Mod to be at it's best. The entire course will take you through 15 stages that are each very fun and eye-popping. Over three weeks went into building, and at last, Epic Sprint Map is finally here!

title: Nick's Parkour Center
short_description: Nick's Parkour Center 0.6.1
full_description:
Getting tired of old, short parkour maps that are either way too easy or brutally frustrating? Well look no further for the greatest, most detailed, and crazy fun parkour map available for MCPE. NPC offers 9 different courses containing a variety of levels in a detailed, themed course. Each course is a different difficulty, allowing you the user to choose what amount of challenge you want to attempt to complete. This isn't one of those maps you beat in 30 minutes. This map was made to be played for weeks on end. NPC is also formatted for multiplayer. Race your friends through the courses, spleef your way to victory, or see who's better with the bow in the Archery Range. So what are you waiting for, download NPC today!

Features:
- 9 Challenging but Fun Parkour Courses :steve_joyous:

- 60 stages over these courses :steve_sillyface:

- Multiplayer Friendly! :steve_lol:

- Archery Range :|):

- Spleef Arenas (Original and 3 Story) :DS:

- Multiplayer specific course :D

- Inspired by Parkour Maps made by Tetrix1193

title: Super Craft Bros Brawl 2.5
short_description: Welcome to Super Craft Brothers 2.5!
full_description:
In this minigame, survive and thrive against your opponents using your favorite class! Play with your friends, play with your enemies, play with your acquaintances! The general goal of the map is to kill all of your opponents, and win your battles. We have Redstone alternatives! We have chickens! What more do you need? Well how about 6 new classes!? AND a new map! Come download the map!

How to begin:

Read the rules (And credits)

Go down the ladders

Break the sand

Choose your map

Choose your class

Then kill everything!

This map is an official Team Serperior Super Craft Brothers PE map, made by Team Serperior. Here are the individual members that had a part in this map.

Khooplah, Serperior, Sirius, Shifter20, RubenPE [no longer in Team Serperior], Tengus, and XxHexEditorxX

Enjoy the map and have fun,

Sincerely,

Team Serperior
file: data/0.7.3/Super Craft Bros Brawl 2.5/Super Craft Bros Brawl 2.5.zip

title: The Teacher minigame
short_description: The Teacher is a minigame made by NoahCraftFTW for the pc
full_description:
The Teacher is a minigame that is very similar to
the minigame Cops And Robbers.
There will be 1 teacher and the rest of the players will be the students.
The goal for the students is to craft a diamond sword and
kill the teacher or escape the school.
The goal for the teacher is to kill the student with the diamond sword.
You have to craft the diamond sword using items that
can be found in chests around the school.
You can't kill the teacher with your hands.

title: Mine York City 0.6.1
short_description: Welcome to Mine York City, the land of opportunity.
full_description:
So what does this map have? It has:

Many Skyscrapers (more than 40!)
A Concert Hall (or stage)
A Small Shopping Mall
An entire road system
An entire subway system
An entire Highway system
At least 5 different islands, all boroughs of the city (Minehatten, Blocker, Lapiz Island, Nether Island, and Ender Island)
Apartment Buildings, characterized if they have beds on every floor
A small Baseball stadium, home to the Mine York Ghasts.
The City's modern Iron Public Library on Nether Island
Mine York City International Airport, next to the largest Highway intersection in the city

FAQ

    Q: WHAT IS REDSTONE ALTERNATIVE?
    A: REDSTONE ALTERNATIVE IS MAKING A INTERACTIVE CONTRAPTION WITHOUT REDSTONE, FOR EXAMPLE, MAKING A GATE WIHOUT REDSTONE!
    Q: WHAT WILL I LEARN IN THIS TUTORIAL MAP?
    A: YOU’LL LEARN HOW TO MAKE A GATE, TIMER, PRESURE PLATE,  AND A LOT MORE…

title: Skyblock Survival Ultimate v2.3
short_description: Hey guys it's me Ted :D I created a special version of Skyblock. It's called Skyblock Sruvival Ultimate.
full_description:
List of features

There are 24 islands in the whole map.
- Sarter island
- Gravel island
- Coal ore island
- Iron ore island
- Clay island
- Gold ore island
- Stone island
- Redstone ore island
- Sand island
- Lapis Lazuli ore island
- Diamond ore island
- Mossy cobblestone island
- Chest island
- Obsidian island
- Farm island
- Ice island
- Bookshelves island
- Bricks island
- Glass island
- Sandstone island
- Cobweb island
- Quartz island
- Glowstone island
- Snow island
And on (almost) every island there are chests with useful blocks and items!


Rules

- Play in Survival mode (don't play on peaceful)
- Don't cheat!
- Do not purposely jump off the island to regenerate your health.
- Have fun! :D

short_description: The entire map was made using minecraft pe (I only transferred it to PC to get some hi res pics with a texture pack), and has taken over two years off and on to create.

title: Tower Hour
short_description: [mini game] [mob wave defense] [20+ waves] [from the creator of Dungeon-Craft]
full_description: Tower Hour is my new mini game. It's a tower defense game, where you fight off waves of mobs. This map uses sand as redstone. There are 20 waves of mobs to defeat, all activated by sand. You also unlock chests with items and gear. This uses lots of mobs, so older devices may lag, so use lower settings if you experience any lag.
